title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
